mapper.update: /* TM_ME32001_Dao_saveWtwkEltengMsrinsList */ MERGE INTO tm_me32001 A USING ( SELECT #{ecsChrgDeptId} AS ecs_chrg_dept_id, #{itslfFcltyNm} AS itslf_fclty_nm, #{mnfctrYm} AS mnfctr_ym, #{mrnrChckHistYm} AS mrnr_chck_hist_ym, #{mrnrChckPlanYm} AS mrnr_chck_plan_ym, #{eltengMsrinsIdnum} AS elteng_msrins_idnum, #{mrnrChgNeedYm} AS mrnr_chg_need_ym, #{rmCtnt} AS rm_ctnt, #{frstRgstrId} AS frst_rgstr_id, #{lastUpdusrId} AS last_updusr_id, #{updtRsn} AS updt_rsn FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.elteng_msrins_idnum = B.elteng_msrins_idnum ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.ecs_chrg_dept_id = B.ecs_chrg_dept_id, A.itslf_fclty_nm = B.itslf_fclty_nm, A.mnfctr_ym = B.mnfctr_ym, A.mrnr_chck_hist_ym = B.mrnr_chck_hist_ym, A.mrnr_chck_plan_ym = B.mrnr_chck_plan_ym, A.mrnr_chg_need_ym = B.mrnr_chg_need_ym, A.rm_ctnt = B.rm_ctnt, A.last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, A.last_updusr_id = B.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn = B.updt_rsn WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.ecs_chrg_dept_id, A.itslf_fclty_nm, A.mnfctr_ym, A.mrnr_chck_hist_ym, A.mrnr_chck_plan_ym, A.elteng_msrins_idnum, A.mrnr_chg_need_ym, A.rm_ctnt, A.frst_regist_dt, A.frst_rgstr_id, A.last_updt_dt, A.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn ) VALUES ( B.ecs_chrg_dept_id, B.itslf_fclty_nm, B.mnfctr_ym, B.mrnr_chck_hist_ym, B.mrnr_chck_plan_ym, B.elteng_msrins_idnum, B.mrnr_chg_need_ym, B.rm_ctnt, SYSDATE, B.frst_rgstr_id, SYSDATE, B.last_updusr_id, B.updt_rsn )
